covered_sentences: Then I asked whether those they ate went to bed too.
I then began to teach him about the true god.
I told him that a great traitor of all things lived off here pointing towards heaven.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Left-right two-panel split, 2:1 ratio, right panel wider. Left panel: camera at mid-height, angled slightly right, island-dweller in medium-close shot asking a pointed question with raised right index finger, companion's back-of-head visible at right edge as near foreground; palisade timber wall behind island-dweller. Right panel: camera pulls back slightly to medium shot, island-dweller now standing with left arm raised pointing upward toward the sky, companion seated below looking up at him; open sky and the top of the earth cliff wall visible behind.

Left panel: island-dweller (brown straight hair, wide-brim hat, goatskin jacket, knife-sheath, sandals) sits leaning forward, right index finger raised questioning; companion's short curly hair and the back of his left shoulder at right edge. Speech bubble from island-dweller: a simplified figure eating sketch + a cloud/afterlife gate sketch + question mark. Right panel: island-dweller stands, left arm raised pointing upward at a 45° angle toward sky; companion (black curly hair, tawny skin, goatskin jacket, shorts, barefoot) seated on the ground below, head tilted up following the pointed direction, face wide-eyed and attentive. Speech bubble from island-dweller: a large crown or radiant circle in the sky sketch ("ruler of all things" pictographic, no text). Companion's head ~at island-dweller's waist height when island-dweller is standing.

Scene: mature wooden-palisade island camp interior; right panel shows open sky visible above the palisade top; warm daytime light; earth cliff wall behind; palisade timbers at sides.

Light and color: warm golden daytime light; right panel has a brighter highlight from above emphasizing the "pointing to heaven" direction, blue-sky tint at top of the frame.

Characters: Island-dweller — brown short straight hair, goatskin wide-brim hat, goatskin short-jacket, goatskin trousers, knife-sheath, leather strap sandals. Companion — black short curly hair, tawny skin, round face, goatskin short-jacket, rough cloth shorts, barefoot. Right panel: island-dweller standing; companion seated, head ~island-dweller's waist.

covered_sentences: He could give everything to us and take everything away from us.
He liked the idea that Jesus christ was sent to save us and that god could hear our prayers.

covered_sentences: He said if god could hear us in heaven, he must be a greater god than benemaki.
Benemaki only heard when people went to the mountains to speak to him.
Friday said he told me that only the old men were allowed to go to speak to benemaki.
Well, I thought, there are cunning priests even among the savages.
I told Friday that the old men were not telling the truth when they said that they had spoken to Ben.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Three-panel horizontal dialogue sequence. Left panel (companion speaks, 2:1 wider): companion in medium shot making a comparative gesture, island-dweller's partial profile at right edge. Middle panel (companion describes mountain priests): companion gestures toward an imagined mountaintop direction; thought bubble shows mountain with single old-man figure. Right panel (island-dweller responds, island-dweller opinion): island-dweller in medium-close, expression wry and knowing, hand waving dismissively; companion's shoulder at left edge.

Left panel (wider, 2/5 of strip): companion (black curly hair, tawny skin, goatskin jacket, shorts, barefoot) sits gesturing with both hands — right hand pointing upward (sky), left hand pointing at a lower direction (mountain) — face animated and reasoning; speech bubble: a sky arc sketch labeled with radiant lines + a lower mountain sketch below it with a tiny figure on top, connected by a comparison arrow (bigger vs. smaller concept, no text). Island-dweller's right profile at right edge. Middle panel (1/5 of strip): companion raises right arm pointing toward imagined mountain direction, left hand flat indicating "only a few"; thought bubble above: mountain peak sketch with one solitary old-man figure and a crowd at the base being turned away (simplified). Right panel (2/5 of strip): island-dweller in medium-close, one brow slightly raised, right hand waving sideways in mild dismissal ("not telling the truth"); expression is sardonic wisdom; speech bubble: simplified group of men with long robes + a crossed-out speech bubble above them ("they lied" concept, pictographic). Companion's left shoulder at left edge.

Scene: mature wooden-palisade island camp interior, daytime; palisade timbers and earth cliff in background.

covered_sentences: I said perhaps they had spoken to the devil.
I then had to explain to Friday who the devil was.
Some days later I spoke to Friday about god again.
Friday said if god is so strong, why does he not destroy the devil?
